--- a/src/hermes/commands/cli.py
+++ b/src/hermes/commands/cli.py
@@ -63,7 +63,11 @@ def main():
     args = parser.parse_args()
     
     # Log command line options for debugging purposes
-    _logger.debug("Processing options: %s", args.options)
+    # Mask values to prevent logging of sensitive data (CVE-2026-22798)
+    masked_options = [
+        [opt[0], '***'] if isinstance(opt, (list, tuple)) and len(opt) >= 2 else opt
+        for opt in (args.options or [])
+    ]
+    _logger.debug("Processing options: %s", masked_options)
     
     # Process the options
     for key, value in args.options or []:

diff --git a/openc3-cosmos-cmd-tlm-api/app/controllers/auth_controller.rb b/openc3-cosmos-cmd-tlm-api/app/controllers/auth_controller.rb
--- a/openc3-cosmos-cmd-tlm-api/app/controllers/auth_controller.rb
+++ b/openc3-cosmos-cmd-tlm-api/app/controllers/auth_controller.rb
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ def authenticate
       if user
         if OpenC3::AuthModel.verify_password(params[:password], user['password'])
           token = OpenC3::AuthModel.generate_token(user['username'], user['roles'])
-          render json: { token: token, user: user }
+          render json: { token: token, user: user.except('password') }
         else
           render json: { error: 'Invalid password' }, status: :unauthorized
         end
@@ -72,7 +72,7 @@ def verify
       decoded_token = OpenC3::AuthModel.verify_token(token)
       if decoded_token
         user = OpenC3::UserModel.get_user(decoded_token['username'])
-        render json: { valid: true, user: user }
+        render json: { valid: true, user: user&.except('password') }
       else
         render json: { valid: false }, status: :unauthorized
       end

     end
 
+    def self.user_to_json(user)
+      user.except('password', 'password_digest').to_json
+    end
+
     def self.verify_password(password, hash)
       BCrypt::Password.new(hash) == password
     rescue BCrypt::Errors::InvalidHash

--- a/src/mrkdwn/escape.ts

-  return text.replace(/(^|\n)(>*)>/g, '$1$2\\>')
+  return text.replace(/(^|\n)>/g, '$1\\>')

--- a/lib/sync.js
+++ b/lib/sync.js
@@ -1,9 +1,26 @@
 var checkParameters = require('./precondition')
 var defaultEncoding = require('./default-encoding')
 var toBuffer = require('./to-buffer')
+var validAlgos = [
+  'md5',
+  'sha1',
+  'sha224',
+  'sha256',
+  'sha384',
+  'sha512',
+  'rmd160',
+  'ripemd160'
+]
+
+function normalizeAlgo (algo) {
+  if (typeof algo !== 'string') throw new TypeError('digest must be a string')
+  return algo.toLowerCase().replace(/-/g, '')
+}
 
 module.exports = function pbkdf2Sync (password, salt, iterations, keylen, digest) {
+  digest = normalizeAlgo(digest)
+  if (validAlgos.indexOf(digest) === -1) {
+    throw new TypeError('Invalid digest: ' + digest)
+  }
   checkParameters(iterations, keylen, digest)
   password = toBuffer(password, defaultEncoding)
   salt = toBuffer(salt, defaultEncoding)
